news.t: XFUNDS and Keith Fitz-Gerald Launch The Must Have Portfolio® ETF, FITZ

holdings.infoBox: FITZ is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock at 5.62%, NVIDIA at 5.19%, Tesla at 5.06%, Apple at 4.96%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 4.89%.

overview.description: The Fitz-Gerald Must Have Portfolio ETF (FITZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed equity ETF that invests in a concentrated portfolio of companies positioned to benefit from long-term structural trends across digitalization, defense, diffusion, distribution, and dislocation. FITZ was launched on May 27, 2026 and is issued by Fitzgerald.

data.title: XFUNDS and Keith Fitz-Gerald Launch The Must Have Portfolio® ETF, FITZ
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $FITZ #ETFs--XFUNDS by Nicholas Wealth today launched the Fitz-Gerald Must Have Portfolio® ETF (NYSE Arca: FITZ), an actively managed, thematically-driven ETF built upon f...
